/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/VertexArray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/VertexBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/VertexBufferLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/TextRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/OBJLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/Deimgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/Engine/FileBrowser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o cpp  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 -ldl
